title: Daily Memo: US Deployment, Kurdish Concerns
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Reinforcement. The United States will send up to 500 troops to Romania to support the U.S. operation in Iran. The Romanian parliament on Wednesday voted in favor of the temporary deployment, which also includes defensive military equipment. According to the Romanian president, the deployed systems will be limited to “refueling planes, monitoring equipment and satellite […]

full_text:
Reinforcement. The United States will send up to 500 troops to Romania to support the U.S. operation in Iran. The Romanian parliament on Wednesday voted in favor of the temporary deployment, which also includes defensive military equipment. According to the Romanian president, the deployed systems will be limited to “refueling planes, monitoring equipment and satellite […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years.
